nameMeanings.name: Turman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (from Ukraine): nickname from Yiddish turman ‘inconstant man’. Compare Thurman .
English: variant of   Thurman  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Thurman
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Nottinghamshire): from the Middle English personal name T(h)urmund, Old Norse Thórmundr, composed of the elements Thórr, the name of the Norse god of thunder (see Thor ) + mundr ‘protection’. This personal name in was rare and Thurman may also have derived from the commoner Middle English personal name T(h)urmod, T(h)urmot by assimilation of the second theme -mod, -mot to the element -mund, which is found in several other compound personal names.
Americanized form of German Thurmann: habitational name for someone from a place called Thur (see Thur ).
Americanized form of German Thurmann: occupational name for a watchman, from Middle Low German torn(e)man (torn(e) ‘tower’) or Middle High German turn, turm ‘tower’ + man ‘man’. Compare Turman .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John C. Turman was born in 1446, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Turman, was 25 and his mother, Anne Pittman, was 21. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Mary Ann Nealy. He died on 4 May 1519, at the age of 73.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John C. Turman è nato il nel 1446 nel Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Turman, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Anne Pittman, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Mary Ann Nealy. Morì il 4 maggio 1519, all'età di 73 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John C. Turman(이)가 1446년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Turman(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Pittman(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Mary Ann Nealy(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1519년 5월 4일 73세의 나이로 사망했다.
